title: Wide Open Town
writer: J. Benton Cheney, Harrison Jacobs, Clarence E. Mulford
actors: William Boyd, Russell Hayden, Andy Clyde
plot: Belle Langtry runs a town being taken over by cattle rustlers. She is also a front for the outlaws, who are led by Steve Fraser. Hoppy gets elected sheriff and cleans up the town with help from the Bar 20 boys.
